literature.title: Enhancing Generalizability in Protein–Ligand Binding Affinity Prediction with Multimodal Contrastive Learning
literature.journal: Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling

study_fork.changes_summary: Added conda environment file and SLURM batch script for MSU HPCC; replaced hardcoded paths with argparse CLI arguments in `dataset_ConBAP.py` and `predict.py`; added per-sample preprocessing and inference timing written to CSV; fixed pocket selection term suffixes (`_protein`/`_ligand`); added fallback handling for alternate ligand file formats and missing protein files; added RDKit valence error workarounds; added `compile_outputs.py` to merge timing CSVs into a combined output.

reproducibility.failure_notes: Preprocessing bugs likely culprits for irreproducibility... had to add fallbacks for RDKit errors.
